# sailpoint_segment (Resource)

Resource for SailPoint Segment. Segments control visibility of access items (access profiles, roles, entitlements) by restricting which identities can see and request them based on expression criteria.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Simple segment — single EQUALS condition
resource "sailpoint_segment" "austin_office" {
  name        = "Austin Office"
  description = "Restricts visibility to Austin-based employees"
  active      = true

  owner = {
    type = "IDENTITY"
    id   = "REPLACE_WITH_OWNER_IDENTITY_ID"
  }

  visibility_criteria = {
    expression = {
      operator  = "EQUALS"
      attribute = "location"
      value = {
        type  = "STRING"
        value = "Austin"
      }
    }
  }
}

# Compound segment — AND with multiple EQUALS children
resource "sailpoint_segment" "austin_engineering" {
  name        = "Austin Engineering"
  description = "Austin-based engineering team members"
  active      = true

  owner = {
    type = "IDENTITY"
    id   = "REPLACE_WITH_OWNER_IDENTITY_ID"
  }

  visibility_criteria = {
    expression = {
      operator = "AND"
      children = [
        {
          operator  = "EQUALS"
          attribute = "location"
          value = {
            type  = "STRING"
            value = "Austin"
          }
        },
        {
          operator  = "EQUALS"
          attribute = "department"
          value = {
            type  = "STRING"
            value = "Engineering"
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the segment.

### Optional

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the segment is operational. Inactive segments do not restrict visibility.
- `description` (String) Description of the segment.
- `owner` (Attributes) The owner of the segment. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--owner))
- `visibility_criteria` (Attributes) Visibility rules that determine which identities the segment applies to. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--visibility_criteria))

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) The date and time the segment was created.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the segment.
- `modified` (String) The date and time the segment was last modified.

<a id="nestedatt--owner"></a>
### Nested Schema for `owner`

Required:

- `id` (String) The ID of the owner.
- `type` (String) The type of the owner object. Must be `IDENTITY`.

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) The name of the owner. Resolved by the server from the owner ID.


<a id="nestedatt--visibility_criteria"></a>
### Nested Schema for `visibility_criteria`

Required:

- `expression` (Attributes) Root expression node. Either an `EQUALS` leaf, or an `AND` branch with `EQUALS` children. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--visibility_criteria--expression))

<a id="nestedatt--visibility_criteria--expression"></a>
### Nested Schema for `visibility_criteria.expression`

Required:

- `operator` (String) Operator for this node. One of `AND`, `EQUALS`.

Optional:

- `attribute` (String) Identity attribute to compare. Required when `operator` is `EQUALS`.
- `children` (Attributes List) Child leaf expressions. Required when `operator` is `AND`. Children cannot have further children. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--visibility_criteria--expression--children))
- `value` (Attributes) Typed value. Required when `operator` is `EQUALS`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--visibility_criteria--expression--value))

<a id="nestedatt--visibility_criteria--expression--children"></a>
### Nested Schema for `visibility_criteria.expression.children`

Required:

- `operator` (String) Operator for this leaf. Typically `EQUALS`.

Optional:

- `attribute` (String) Identity attribute to compare.
- `value` (Attributes) Typed value. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--visibility_criteria--expression--children--value))

<a id="nestedatt--visibility_criteria--expression--children--value"></a>
### Nested Schema for `visibility_criteria.expression.children.value`

Required:

- `type` (String) Value type (e.g., `STRING`).
- `value` (String) Value to compare against.



<a id="nestedatt--visibility_criteria--expression--value"></a>
### Nested Schema for `visibility_criteria.expression.value`

Required:

- `type` (String) Value type (e.g., `STRING`).
- `value` (String) Value to compare against.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
#!/bin/bash
# Import an existing segment by its ID
terraform import sailpoint_segment.austin_office "REPLACE_WITH_SEGMENT_ID"
```
